plcNodes.name: EIN Registration
plcNodes.description: Employer Identification Number and federal tax registration. Required for all business entities for tax reporting, employment tax obligations, and employee hiring.

plcNodes.name: FDA Registration
plcNodes.description: Facility registration required for businesses manufacturing, processing, packing, or holding food for human or animal consumption.

plcNodes.name: ATF License
plcNodes.agency: Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms & Explosives (ATF)
plcNodes.description: Federal firearms license required for dealing, manufacturing, or importing firearms and ammunition.

plcNodes.name: TTB Alcohol Permit
plcNodes.agency: Alcohol & Tobacco Tax and Trade Bureau (TTB)
plcNodes.description: Federal permit required for businesses producing, warehousing, or wholesaling alcohol beverages.

plcNodes.name: FCC License
plcNodes.description: License required for operating radio, television, wire, satellite, and cable communications equipment.

plcNodes.name: DOT / FMCSA Authority
plcNodes.description: Operating authority required for interstate commercial motor vehicle transportation of passengers or cargo.

plcNodes.name: DEA Registration
plcNodes.description: Registration required for practitioners, pharmacies, and facilities that handle controlled substances.

plcNodes.name: FAA Certification
plcNodes.description: Certification for commercial pilot operations, aircraft operators, and unmanned aircraft systems.

plcNodes.name: EPA Permit
plcNodes.description: Permits for air emissions, water discharge, hazardous waste handling, and chemical storage compliance.

plcNodes.name: USDA License
plcNodes.description: Licensing for animal dealers, exhibitors, agricultural importers/exporters, and organic certifications.

plcNodes.name: Federal Background Check
plcNodes.description: Criminal history check required for professions involving public trust, security, or vulnerable populations.

plcNodes.name: Wetlands Permit (USACE)
plcNodes.description: Section 404 permit for discharge of dredged or fill material into waters of the United States, including wetlands.

plcNodes.name: Business Registration
plcNodes.description: Formation and registration of business entity (LLC, corporation, partnership) with the state.

plcNodes.name: State Tax Registration
plcNodes.description: Registration for state income tax withholding, unemployment insurance, and other state-level tax obligations.

plcNodes.name: Sales & Use Tax
plcNodes.description: Sales tax permit required for collecting and remitting sales tax on taxable goods and services.

plcNodes.name: Professional License
plcNodes.description: Occupational license required for regulated professions including healthcare, legal, engineering, and cosmetology.

plcNodes.name: Contractor License
plcNodes.description: State license for general and specialty contractors, requiring proof of experience, bonding, and insurance.

plcNodes.name: Health Dept License
plcNodes.description: Health facility or food service license ensuring compliance with state sanitation and safety codes.

plcNodes.name: Liquor License
plcNodes.description: License to sell alcoholic beverages for on-premises consumption or off-premises retail distribution.

plcNodes.name: Environmental Permit
plcNodes.description: State-level permits for air quality, water discharge, waste management, and hazardous materials handling.

plcNodes.name: Workers’ Comp
plcNodes.description: Mandatory insurance coverage providing wage replacement and medical benefits to employees injured on the job.

plcNodes.name: Pharmacy License
plcNodes.description: State license to operate a pharmacy, dispense prescription medications, and maintain controlled substance records.

plcNodes.name: Childcare License
plcNodes.description: License for operating a childcare center, ensuring compliance with staff ratios, safety, and facility standards.

plcNodes.name: Motor Carrier Permit
plcNodes.description: State operating authority for intrastate commercial transportation of passengers or property.

plcNodes.name: Cannabis License
plcNodes.description: State license for cultivation, processing, distribution, or retail sale of cannabis products.

plcNodes.name: Insurance License
plcNodes.description: License to sell, solicit, or negotiate insurance products as an agent or broker within the state.

plcNodes.name: Real Estate License
plcNodes.description: License to practice real estate as a salesperson or broker, requiring exam passage and continuing education.

plcNodes.name: Fire Marshal Approval
plcNodes.description: Fire safety plan review and approval for assembly occupancies, high-hazard facilities, and institutional buildings.

plcNodes.name: Liability Insurance
plcNodes.description: Professional liability or general liability insurance coverage required by state law for certain occupations.

plcNodes.name: Environmental Review
plcNodes.description: Environmental impact assessment required for projects that may significantly affect the environment.

plcNodes.name: Water Rights Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit to appropriate, use, or divert surface water or groundwater for agricultural, industrial, or municipal use.

plcNodes.name: Timber Harvest Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit for commercial timber harvesting, requiring a forest management plan and environmental safeguards.

plcNodes.name: Agricultural Permit
plcNodes.description: Permits for agricultural operations including crop production, livestock, pesticide use, and organic certification.

plcNodes.name: Mining Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit for surface or subsurface mining operations, requiring reclamation plans and environmental compliance.

plcNodes.name: Foster Care License
plcNodes.description: License to provide foster care, requiring home inspections, background checks, and training completion.

plcNodes.name: Business License
plcNodes.description: General business license authorizing commercial activity within the municipality or county.

plcNodes.name: Zoning Approval
plcNodes.description: Verification that the proposed business use is permitted under current zoning ordinances for the property.

plcNodes.name: Building Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit for new construction, renovation, or tenant build-out, requiring plan review and inspections.

plcNodes.name: Certificate of Occupancy
plcNodes.description: Final certification that the building meets all applicable codes and is safe for the intended use.

plcNodes.name: Fire Inspection
plcNodes.description: On-site inspection verifying fire suppression systems, emergency exits, occupancy limits, and alarm systems.

plcNodes.name: Health Inspection
plcNodes.description: Inspection of food preparation areas, storage, sanitation practices, and compliance with health codes.

plcNodes.name: Signage Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit for exterior business signs, ensuring compliance with size, illumination, and placement regulations.

plcNodes.name: Special Use Permit
plcNodes.description: Conditional approval for business uses not permitted by-right in the zoning district, often requiring a public hearing.

plcNodes.name: Home Occupation Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit allowing a business to operate from a residential property under specific conditions and limitations.

plcNodes.name: Entertainment License
plcNodes.description: License for venues providing live music, dancing, DJ performances, karaoke, or other public entertainment.

plcNodes.name: Demolition Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit for partial or full demolition of structures, requiring asbestos surveys and utility disconnection.

plcNodes.name: Grading / Excavation
plcNodes.description: Permit for earthwork, grading, and excavation activities that alter the natural drainage or terrain.

plcNodes.name: Stormwater Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit ensuring construction and development projects manage stormwater runoff and prevent erosion.

plcNodes.name: Historic Preservation Review
plcNodes.description: Review of exterior alterations, demolition, or new construction within designated historic districts.

plcNodes.name: Electrical Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit for electrical wiring, panel upgrades, and fixture installations requiring licensed electrician work.

plcNodes.name: Plumbing Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit for plumbing installations, repairs, and modifications requiring licensed plumber sign-off.

plcNodes.name: Event Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit for outdoor festivals, parades, concerts, and public gatherings exceeding standard occupancy.

plcNodes.name: Film / Photo Permit
plcNodes.description: Permit for commercial photography or film production on public property or requiring road closures.

plcNodes.name: Rental Registration
plcNodes.description: Registration of residential rental properties, ensuring compliance with habitability standards and lead paint rules.

plcNodes.name: Short-Term Rental License
plcNodes.description: License for operating vacation rentals or Airbnb-style accommodations, subject to local occupancy and tax rules.

plcNodes.name: Housing Inspection
plcNodes.description: Inspection of rental units for compliance with building codes, fire safety, and habitability requirements.

plcNodes.name: Street Closure Permit
plcNodes.description: Temporary permit to close public streets for events, construction, or utility work.
